title: Nanjing, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Nanjing is a city in Jiangsu with a population of 9,314,000. An ancient capital with rich history, tree-lined boulevards, top universities, and a balanced economy spanning manufacturing and services.
